title: Incorrect caching of sub-query results in the FROM clause of a scalar sub-query.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age Nullable(UInt32), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE age IS NOT NULL) AS valid_user_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS total_user_count;
SELECT name FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE age > 25);
key_bug_features: Caching of sub-query results in FROM clause
